description: Legal document(s). Fragment. Written across two columns (or two pages), so possibly a court register. The names Ṣāʿid and [...] b. Abū Naṣr appear. A sum of at least 2 dinars is mentioned in each column. The document on the right is dated the first third of Ḥeshvan, but the year is torn off.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
